note: content_sha256 empty: owner files are (new) and do not yet exist; forge-run computes on the merged branch.

contracts.name: ResearchConfig
contracts.signature: ResearchConfig() -> nested config (windowing, candidate_generation, scene_detection, quality, deduplication, ocr, vision, export)

contracts.name: FrameCandidate
contracts.signature: FrameCandidate(candidate_id, source_id, region_id?, timestamp_seconds, image_path, width, height, extraction_method, metrics: FrameVisualMetrics, metadata)

contracts.name: ResearchManifest
contracts.signature: ResearchManifest(manifest_version, generated_at, source: MediaAsset, query?, regions[], captures[], processing)

contracts.name: run_ffmpeg
contracts.signature: run_ffmpeg(args, input_path, output_path, overwrite=True, dry_run=False, pre_input_args: list[str] | None = None) -> FFmpegResult

contracts.name: extract_frame
contracts.signature: extract_frame(video_path, timestamp_seconds, output_path=None, quality='high', fmt='png') -> FrameCandidate

contracts.name: detect_scene_changes
contracts.signature: detect_scene_changes(video_path, start_seconds=None, end_seconds=None, threshold=0.30, minimum_gap_seconds=1.0) -> list[SceneChange]

contracts.name: select_regions
contracts.signature: select_regions(repo, query: ResearchQuery, config: ResearchConfig) -> list[ResearchRegion]

contracts.name: generate_candidates
contracts.signature: generate_candidates(video_path, region: ResearchRegion, source: MediaAsset, config: ResearchConfig) -> list[FrameCandidate]

contracts.name: deduplicate
contracts.signature: deduplicate(candidates: list[FrameCandidate], threshold: int, rank_key) -> tuple[list[FrameCandidate], dict]

contracts.name: export_package
contracts.signature: export_package(manifest: ResearchManifest, output_dir, obsidian=False, keep_candidates=False) -> ResearchManifest

contracts.name: research_video
contracts.signature: research_video(source, transcript=None, query=None, topics=None, timestamp_ranges=None, config: ResearchConfig | None = None) -> ResearchManifest
